welcomeText1: The Cazenovia Club is a private tennis and social club on the stunning shores of Cazenovia Lake. We offer clay and hard court facilities for players of all skill levels, along with newly added pickleball on our hard courts.
welcomeText2: Beyond tennis, members enjoy a rich social calendar — seasonal celebrations, swimming, boating, themed evenings like "International Night," date nights with childcare services, and traditional black-tie events. There is something for everyone at the Cazenovia Club.
